title: Takker® Easy One-Step Hardwall Picture Frame Hanging Tool Kit - No Tools/Nails Required – As Seen On Dragon’s Den - Hang On Brick, Tiles, Plaster, Wood, Up to 10kg Pictures Decor Utensils Tools
features: WALL HANGING ESSENTIALS: At Takker, we have worked extremely hard to develop a picture hanging kit that enables straightforward wall decoration, with a sturdy and smooth finish. The Hardwall Takker tool and the assortment of picture hanging hooks and takks included in this 78 piece kit combine to create the ultimate wall hanging kit. You'll be able to hang an astounding total of 10 kgs on your chosen surface - from clocks to mirrors, we've got you covered!

NO BATTERIES REQUIRED: The Hardwall Takker is a hand powered device for hanging pictures, mirrors and much more onto any hard wall surface in seconds. This fantastic picture hanging tool replaces the need for electric drills, wall plugs, screws, and screwdrivers. You won't need to worry about damaging your walls, simply read the included instruction leaflet and get hanging! Home decoration made fun and easy with Hardwall Takker

PICTURE HANGERS WITHOUT NAILS: A necessity for any home improvement projects you have coming up, this picture hanger kit carries a tremendous total of 78 pieces. Included you will find: 1 x Hardwall Takker, 48 x HW Takks (12 pre-loaded in the Hardwall Takker), 12 x Picture Hooks, 12 x Canvas Hangers, 5 Multi-Purpose Hooks, 1 x Instruction Leaflet, and 1 x Mail Order Box. Everything you need to hang pictures without nails and transform your home!

VERSATILE APPLICATION: This Hardwall Takker kit shows impressive results when used on a variety of surfaces. It is suitable for use on plaster, plasterboard, wood, bricks and ceramic tiles. You may hang the home decor of your choice upon walls, doors, fencing, and even garden sheds. To go that one step further, Takker has ensured each item in this kit is electric cable and water pipe friendly

ABOUT OUR BRAND: Born in Northern Ireland, Takker has crafted innovative DIY solutions since winning investment on Dragons' Den in 2009. Our versatile products make hanging wall art, canvases, decorations, pictures, mirrors, and clocks a breeze on any wall surface. The Takker & HW Takker items are designed for use in homes, gardens, offices, galleries, student accommodations, hotels, schools, and more, offering practical solutions for a variety of needs.
description: From the brand Previous page Takker's journey began in 2009 with a successful appearance on the Irish Dragons Den TV series. Since then, we have been dedicated to crafting innovative, practical and reliable DIY tools that make decorating your space a breeze. We've expanded our product line to include self-adhesive hooks and canvas hooks, all designed to provide an effortless solution for picture and wall hanging.
